ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "actors" TEXT /* List of main actors */,
  "tags" TEXT /* User-generated tags and comments about the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the movie */,
  "countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was left */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being tagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: User-generated tags and comments about the movie

Countries where the movie was produced
Password of the user (hashed for security)
URL of the user's profile picture
Date and time of the user's last login

Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin)
ID of the user who left the review

Date and time the review was left
Date and time the review was last updated
ID of the movie being tagged
ID of the user who created the tag
Date and time the tag was created
